summary: Backend-only Task 7 verification complete. AdaptiveShiftAgent behavior and full regression suite are green.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for Task 7 scope.
Optional: add explicit constructor validation for alphabet length >= 2 in shift-based agents to fail fast on degenerate alphabets.
critical_code_review_comments: AdaptiveShiftAgent enforces reset-before-use and remains deterministic under identical runs.
Revision search behavior matches user-selected option (a): after failed committed shift streak, candidate advances to next shift in order instead of restarting.
Agent-facing contract is preserved: observe() consumes only observation/action/AgentFeedback(correct, reward, done), with no oracle-field dependency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed pytest /app/tests -v --tb=short with JUnit XML at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results_iteration8.xml; all AdaptiveShiftAgent requirements and regression tests passed. NO MOCKED APIs used.
rca of the issue: No defects reproduced in this iteration. Previous concerns from earlier iterations remain resolved under current test matrix.
